user.title: Sonos Hue Sync
user.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.

data_description.sonos_entity: Choose the Sonos media player to follow. For grouped speakers, choose the room that shows active playback metadata.
data_description.light_entities: Primary targets to control. You can select individual lights, Hue rooms, zones, groups, or helper entities.
data_description.group_entities: Optional. Add real Hue room, zone, or group entities to expand into their member lights. These are added to the primary targets instead of replacing them.
data_description.member_light_entities: Optional. Add individual light entities directly. Use this as a reliable workaround when a Hue group does not expose every member consistently.
data_description.color_count: Number of colors to extract from album art. If there are more lights than colors, colors repeat.
data_description.transition: Fade time in seconds when applying new colors.
data_description.filter_dull: Remove black, gray, muddy, or very dark colors while keeping useful color tones.
data_description.filter_bright_white: Remove harsh pure or cool white colors while keeping warmer cream and soft white tones.
data_description.cache: Reuse colors for album art that has already been processed.
data_description.expand_groups: When enabled, colors are applied to individual lights inside selected groups instead of one color for the whole group.
data_description.assignment_strategy: Controls how colors are assigned to lights. Balanced spreads distinct colors, Sequential follows palette order, Alternating bright / dim mixes luminance, and Brightness order sorts colors from bright to dark.
